concepts.title: Riemannian metrics
concepts.blurb: A smoothly varying inner product on tangent spaces defines length, angle, and volume.

concepts.title: Levi-Civita connection and geodesics
concepts.blurb: The unique torsion-free metric connection defines covariant differentiation and geodesic equations.

concepts.title: Curvature tensor and comparison
concepts.blurb: Sectional curvature controls topology and global metric behavior through comparison theorems.

concepts.title: Ricci curvature and Einstein manifolds
concepts.blurb: The trace of the Riemann tensor measures average sectional curvature, governs geodesic-ball volumes, and drives Einstein's equations.

concepts.title: Riemannian volume form and divergence
concepts.blurb: The metric produces a canonical volume form \sqrt{\det g}\,dx^1\wedge\cdots\wedge dx^n, giving integration, divergence, and the Laplace-Beltrami operator on (M,g).
